name: Caribbean Pasta with Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the flavorless cooking oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the finely minced garlic, shallots, and ginger. Sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
3. Add the raw medium shrimp to the pan. Cook until they turn pink and are cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Stir in the favorite pasta and cook for an additional 8-10 minutes or until the pasta is al dente.
5. Remove from heat and mix in the cilantro sprigs.
6. Serve hot.
